# Warranty Claim

To file a warranty claim with Acme Shop, customers must first confirm that their product is still under the one-year limited warranty by checking their purchase date. If eligible, they should collect necessary documentation, including proof of purchase and a description of the issue, and submit an online claim form on the Acme Shop website. Claims are reviewed within 3-5 business days, and if approved, a prepaid shipping label will be provided to return the defective item. Customers are liable for costs if the item is not covered under warranty, and any further questions can be directed to Acme Shop's support team.

[Source: warranty.md#warranty-claim]
